message:
🌱 Recompile all gh-aw workflows with v0.58.3

Upgraded gh-aw from v0.53.4 to v0.58.3 and recompiled all 5 agentic
workflows. Removed sandbox.agent:false from 3 workflows (now disallowed
in strict mode) — the default sandbox is sufficient for these.

Workflows recompiled:
- auto-triage
- handle-complications
- implement-fix
- stuck-detection
- verify-preview

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@
 # \  /\  / (_) | | | | ( | | | | (_) \ V  V /\__ \
 #  \/  \/ \___/|_| |_|\_\|_| |_|\___/ \_/\_/ |___/

-# This file was automatically generated by gh-aw (v0.53.4). DO NOT EDIT.

           GH_AW_INFO_VERSION: ""

           GH_AW_INFO_STAGED: "false"

+          GH_AW_INFO_AWF_VERSION: "v0.24.1"

           GH_AW_INFO_FIREWALL_TYPE: "squid"

         with:
           script: |
